changes: Validated Windows compatibility against live PokePath TD 1.5.2 vanilla files
Updated installer vanilla compatibility fingerprints for 1.5.2 PokemonScene.js and Area.js
Orbital Pokémon now use directional targeting modes (clockwise / counterClockwise) instead of inert target selection
Orbital direction updates now refresh active orbitals immediately for deployed towers
macOS compatibility for 1.5.x remains pending dedicated validation
